positioning: Company Brain does not replace a company's agents or systems. It is the governed memory checkpoint they call before consequential actions.

connection_boundaries.title: GitHub merged pull requests
connection_boundaries.description: Signed merged-PR intake persists raw evidence, Qwen memory, audit record, and source lineage. The aggregate NexaFlow check owns the release decision.
connection_boundaries.scope: One signed GitHub intake; self-service GitHub App onboarding is not claimed.

connection_boundaries.title: Slack incidents
connection_boundaries.description: Signed Slack Events API intake for one configured #ops-incidents channel. Messages become source-backed evidence; Company Brain never posts to Slack.
connection_boundaries.scope: Read-only selected-channel evidence, not workspace-wide search.

connection_boundaries.title: Alibaba OSS runbook
connection_boundaries.description: A read-only RAM identity syncs only objects under one private OSS runbook prefix and keeps object-version provenance.
requirements: RAM identity with oss:ListObjects and oss:GetObject only
connection_boundaries.scope: No OSS write capability or public bucket access is claimed.

connection_boundaries.title: Verified web evidence
connection_boundaries.description: Authenticated fetch of a configured public HTTPS URL with host allowlisting and SSRF controls. This is not a web-search connector.

connection_boundaries.title: Connect a workflow
connection_boundaries.description: Any company workflow can submit normalized evidence and live context, then receive the same auditable DecisionBrief used by the inbox.

contracts.purpose: Pre-flight memory and deterministic safety check

example.description: Submit source-backed evidence and current live context.

evidence.excerpt: Fulfillment workers require at least 24 MiB of memory before promotion.
SEV-2 is resolved; fulfillment promotion may resume.

example.code:
curl -X POST https://brain.veriflowai.me/workflow-runs \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -H 'X-Brain-Api-Key: cb_live_...' \
  -d '{"template_id":"nexaflow-release-safety","evidence":[{"source_type":"alibaba_oss_object","source_name":"Alibaba Cloud OSS runbook","external_id":"nexaflow-runbook-v1","occurred_at":"2026-07-20T10:11:15.395039+00:00","excerpt":"Fulfillment workers require at least 24 MiB of memory before promotion."},{"source_type":"slack_message","source_name":"Slack #ops-incidents","external_id":"nexaflow-sev2-1","occurred_at":"2026-07-20T10:11:15.395039+00:00","excerpt":"SEV-2 is resolved; fulfillment promotion may resume."},{"source_type":"github_pull_request","source_name":"GitHub","external_id":"nexaflow-logistics-demo#42","occurred_at":"2026-07-20T10:11:15.395039+00:00","excerpt":"Merged configuration sets NEXAFLOW_FULFILLMENT_WORKER_MEMORY_MB=32."}],"live_context":{"configured_memory_meets_runbook":true,"linked_incident_open":false}}'

connection_boundaries.title: Connect an agent
connection_boundaries.description: An MCP client can call Company Brain before a consequential action; the server, not the caller, resolves organization identity from its API key.
connection_boundaries.scope: OAuth 2.1 is a production roadmap, not a hackathon claim.

status_definitions.connected: A real, configured connection is available on this deployment.
status_definitions.setup_required: The connector exists, but required server configuration is missing.
status_definitions.contract_ready: A stable HTTP contract is available for a company to call.
status_definitions.fixture: A deterministic demo adapter or example; it is not a live connector.
status_definitions.preview: An implemented capability that is not yet configured as a production connection.
